legal.privacySubtitle: Protecting Your Data with Transparency and Trust

privacy.intro1: At EASICloud we respect our customers' privacy and take great care to safeguard the personal information of our customers and visitors to our website. We have developed this Privacy Statement to inform you about our privacy practices, which reflects the requirements of Canada's privacy legislation, the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, and our own continuing commitment to customer privacy.
privacy.intro2: This Privacy Statement describes the ways we collect information from and about you and what we do with the information, so that you may make an informed decision whether or not to provide your personal information.
privacy.intro3: We ensure that our customers are provided with the most secure online experience, while also tailoring our services to address your unique needs. We also want to ensure that we have your consent to continue to collect, use and disclose your personal information for the purposes identified in this Privacy Statement.
privacy.whyHeading: Why do we collect Personal Information?
privacy.why1: We may use your information to process your inquiries, service requests, handle orders, deliver products and services, process payments, communicate with you about products and product updates, and to enable us to review, develop and continually improve the products, services, and offers we provide. We also use this information to prevent or detect fraud or abuses of our Website and to enable third parties to carry out technical, logistical or other functions on our behalf. This information will be shared with the EASICloud group of companies, unless specifically stated otherwise.
privacy.why2: EASICloud may require your name, (e-mail) address, postal code, and other information. The more information you are willing to provide, the better EASICloud can customize your experience. EASICloud does not sell or rent user information.
privacy.discloseHeading: When does EASICloud disclose personal information?
privacy.disclose1: EASICloud may disclose your purchase information to business partners and suppliers. Most software publishers require us to provide them with reports on products purchased and by whom. We are contractually obliged to provide this information and you should assume this to be the case for all products and services sold by EASICloud.
privacy.disclose2: EASICloud may transfer personal information to trusted third parties for processing and storage purposes. Such personal information may be transferred across provincial and national borders, in which case, the information may become subject to the legislation of the jurisdiction to which it is transferred.
privacy.disclose3: We may also disclose personal information to other EASICloud business units, companies or individuals we have hired to provide services for us, credit reporting agencies, government agencies and other entities as required by law or in urgent circumstances, to protect personal safety, the public or our websites.
privacy.protectHeading: How do we protect your personal information?
privacy.protect1: EASICloud takes reasonable precautions to protect personal information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. We use a variety of security technologies and procedures to help protect your personal information. Our databases are protected from general employee access by security measures, and are accessible only to those who need to access the information. User account passwords are used to protect customer information, so you should take care to protect access to these passwords.
privacy.choices1: When you use our website or contact us by phone or email, your provision of information to us is entirely voluntary. You can choose to have your name removed from our telephone, mailing or e-mail lists and stop receiving the types of communication that you no longer wish to receive. You can also choose to refuse to provide us with personal information, or you can withdraw your consent to our use of information. However, in either of these cases, we may not be able to provide you with the products and services that you have requested.
privacy.changesPrefix: EASICloud may update this Privacy Statement from time to time. We will not reduce the level of protection for your personal information under this Privacy Statement without your consent. If you have questions about this Privacy Statement, please contact us by email at

terms.intro1: By accessing the EASICloud Web Site ("Site") you agree to be bound by the following Terms of Use. This Site is operated by EASICloud Corporation ("EASICloud").
terms.introNotice: IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THESE TERMS OF USE, YOU MAY NOT USE THE SITE.
terms.intro2: "You" and "your" refer to any users of the Site. EASICloud reserves the right, at its sole discretion to change, add or remove portions of these Terms of Use, at any time. Providing that you comply with these Terms of Use, EASICloud grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited permission to enter and use this Site.
terms.section1: While EASICloud uses reasonable efforts to include accurate and up-to-date information on the Site, your use and browsing of the Site is at your risk. Nothing in the Site, including product or service information, shall add to or change any contract for products or services you may have with EASICloud, its suppliers or affiliates. Neither EASICloud, its partners, suppliers, affiliates nor any other party involved in creating, producing or delivering the Site shall be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, punitive or other damages whatsoever including business interruption, loss of use, data, information, profits (regardless of the form of action, including but not limited to contract, negligence or other tortious act) arising out of or in connection with your access or use of the Site even if EASICloud has been advised of or foresees the possibility of any damages occurring.
terms.section2: The information and materials in this Site may be used for personal and lawful purposes only. You may not post or transmit through this Site any material that violates or infringes in any way the rights of others or the laws of Canada.
terms.section3: EASICloud is not responsible for the content on any website linked to the Site. Such links are provided for your convenience only and do not imply EASICloud's endorsement or responsibility for such sites.
terms.section4: The content of this Site, including but not limited to the text, software, scripts, graphics, photos, sounds, music, videos, works of authorship, and the trademarks, logos and service marks displayed on this Site are the sole property of EASICloud and its licensors.
terms.section5: EASICloud reserves the right, but has no obligation, to monitor the Site and to disclose any information to satisfy any applicable law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request, or to edit, refuse to post, or remove any information, in whole or in part, that is objectionable or in violation of these Terms of Use.
terms.section6: EASICloud attempts to be as accurate as possible in product descriptions. However, EASICloud does not warrant that product descriptions or other content of this Site is accurate, complete, reliable, current, or error-free.
terms.section7: By using this Site you consent to the collection and use of personal information by EASICloud as specified in the Privacy Statement.
terms.section8: EASICloud is not responsible for any damage to your computer, software or other equipment as a result of any viruses or other harmful components encountered in connection with use of the Site.
terms.section9: You agree to defend, indemnify and hold harmless EASICloud from any and all claims arising from your use of the Site.
terms.section10: In no event shall EASICloud be liable for any damages whatsoever arising from the use or inability to use this Site or any linked site.
terms.section11: Failure by EASICloud to enforce any provision of these Terms of Use shall not be deemed a waiver of such provision.
terms.section12: These Terms of Use shall be governed by the laws of Ontario and Canada. Any disputes arising from these Terms of Use or your use of the Site shall be resolved in the courts of Ontario.
